message:
feat(demo-showcase): add DragDrop/Quake screens, dashboard splitters, and mouse reliability fixes

This commit delivers major enhancements to the demo showcase application,
including two new screens, dashboard layout improvements, and mouse
interaction reliability fixes across multiple existing screens.

**New screens:**
- Register `DragDrop` screen (ScreenCategory::Interaction) — sortable and
  cross-container drag-and-drop interactions with full keyboard parity and
  accessibility support.
- Register `QuakeEasterEgg` screen (ScreenCategory::Visuals) — a retro
  Quake E1M1 braille-rendered 3D easter-egg screen with depth buffer,
  minimap, and frame timing display.

**app.rs — mouse dispatch reliability (Fixes #108, #109, #110):**
- Remove `PendingDrag` initiation for `pane_link_hit` targets so dashboard
  tile clicks work reliably even with slight mouse movement during press.
- Remove `PendingDrag` initiation for `chrome_hit` targets (tabs, status
  bar) to fix flaky click registration caused by jitter exceeding the
  2-cell drag threshold.
- Reinstate `MouseDown` event consumption for chrome targets to prevent
  click-through to underlying screen content (regression from #109 fix).
- Wire `DragDrop` and `QuakeEasterEgg` into the screen dispatch, update,
  and view routing.

**dashboard.rs — resizable bottom row with splitter drag:**
- Add `DashboardSplitterDrag` enum and `bottom_primary_bps`/
  `bottom_secondary_bps` state for basis-point column sizing.
- Implement `update_bottom_splitter_drag()` for mouse-driven column
  resizing with clamped min/max bounds.
- Split the text-effects tile into primary/secondary sub-regions with
  independent layout rects.
- Add a bottom row layout region with three independently-sized columns.

**drag_drop.rs — expanded interaction model:**
- Expand the drag-and-drop demo with keyboard-driven item reordering,
  cross-container transfers, and visual drop-target indicators.

**quake.rs — enhanced E1M1 renderer:**
- Expand the Quake easter-egg with depth buffering, minimap rendering,
  collision detection, and per-frame timing statistics.

**layout_lab.rs — interactive constraint adjustment:**
- Replace no-op `adjust_constraint()` stub with actual preset constraint
  editing (gap, alignment, margin values).
- Lower minimum terminal size requirements (height 4, width 8) and add a
  compact preview-only mode for heights < 11.
- Adjust main layout split from 55/45 to 58/42 for better preview space.

**Other screen improvements:**
- advanced_text_editor.rs: Minor refactoring for consistency.
- determinism_lab.rs: Minor adjustments.
- forms_input.rs: Minor adjustments.
- inline_mode_story.rs: Minor adjustments.
- layout_inspector.rs: Minor adjustments.
- markdown_live_editor.rs: Minor refactoring.
- table_theme_gallery.rs: Minor adjustments.
- visual_effects.rs: Minor adjustments.
- widget_builder.rs: Minor adjustments.
- widget_gallery.rs: Expanded widget gallery entries.
- chrome.rs, cli.rs, main.rs, theme.rs: Wiring for new screens and
  minor style updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -566,6 +566,26 @@ pub const SCREEN_REGISTRY: &[ScreenMeta] = &[
         default_hotkey: None,
         tour_step_hint: None,
     },
+    ScreenMeta {
+        id: ScreenId::DragDrop,
+        title: "Drag & Drop Lab",
+        short_label: "DragDrop",
+        category: ScreenCategory::Interaction,
+        palette_tags: &["drag", "drop", "sortable", "keyboard", "accessibility"],
+        blurb: "Sortable and cross-container drag/drop interactions with keyboard parity.",
+        default_hotkey: None,
+        tour_step_hint: Some("Drag + drop interactions"),
+    },
+    ScreenMeta {
+        id: ScreenId::QuakeEasterEgg,
+        title: "Quake E1M1 (Easter Egg)",
+        short_label: "Quake",
+        category: ScreenCategory::Visuals,
+        palette_tags: &["quake", "3d", "easter-egg", "braille", "renderer"],
+        blurb: "Retro Quake E1M1 renderer as the final easter-egg screen.",
+        default_hotkey: None,
+        tour_step_hint: Some("Final easter egg"),
+    },
 ];
 
 /// Return the filtered registry (ordered), excluding feature-gated screens.
